title: Youtuber Natural Disasters
description: A faithful recreation of the mod used in the video 100 Minecraft YouTubers VS Natural Disasters.
body:
This is a recreation of the mod used in the video 100 Minecraft YouTubers VS Natural Disasters! (This video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h61SlPZfWfw)

This is made with MCreator; however, please give our mod a chance! We promise we have tried to make it as high quality as possible (the perfectionist in us forces us to either way), and we hope you enjoy it!

The purpose of this mod is to be as faithful to the original mod as possible, based on the original video and what Vini has told us. We took a few creative liberties to make it better (and definitely not because we were lazy). At the moment we are improving things based on suggestions, so feel free to leave comments!  

Thanks to Vini2003 and Corgi Taco not only for creating these cool mods that have inspired us, but also for giving us advice and being chill with us creating this project. Definitely go check them out as well!!

You can also find it on CurseForge! https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/youtuber-natural-disasters

**This has dependencies:** Weather Storms and Tornadoes, CoroUtil, Photon, LDLib, and Tickrate API.

We highly advise you get Skyfall: Meteors as well, it is a great mod that works really well with the rest of this mod.

Apologies for any lag, this is still getting polished and is getting added to, so this is better for high quality PCs (however it still mostly works on bad ones too, we've tested it!)

You can turn on and off natural spawning with the game rule disaster spawning, if you just want the chaos to be up to your friends.

The Features:

**Disasters:**

Meteors and an End Of World Meteor, Natural Gas, Sinkholes, Earthquake, Volcanoes, Wildfire, Black Hole, Timephoon 

**Items:**

Throw TNT, Throw Lightning, Bred, Coin, Apple Of Wisdom, Golden Apple Giver, Saturation Filler, Mace, Music Disc 

**Entities:**

CavemanFilms, CragDyna, Cosmic, DapperMrTom, Knarfy, InsaneFlame, Mr Coosh, Zachary95, AstralSpiff, BadBoyHalo, Cammaganza, Coolment, Freshi, GarrettTheCarrot, imasquidkid, jojosolos, JustKaboodle, MaxGGs, Mysticat, Ph1Lza, Pikalodon, Ranboo, Reddoons, Reyablipblop, Squiddo, TalonMC, TapL, Tubbo, Winsweep, Yeah_Jaron, **_Technoblade_**.

Thank you so much again for looking at it, and we hope you enjoy!


Also, we want Tom's approval on this mod (We got Vini's, Corgi Taco's, and all the people who are NPCs in the mod), to make it more legitimate since it was his video, so hopefully he sees this! 

Feel free to use this mod in YouTube videos, but please credit us in your videos; we worked really hard on this.

Have a good day, and remember to wear your seatbelt.
